text_block_list.text:
One of Smart Falcon's classmates is racing today,
so we've come to watch.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! First place! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
She's been working really hard lately! She's even
been doing extra training on her own every day
until night!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She's finally gonna take center stage in a
winning concert. I have to keep supporting her as
much as I can from here on! ♪

Happy for her friend's victory, Smart Falcon waits
for the winning concert to start, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is the concert delayed?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
She looked like she was in good shape when she
crossed the finish line. There's no way she's
injured or anything, right?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can't sit around and wait! Let's go check on
her, Trainer!

Smart Falcon is worried about her friend who won
the race, so we head backstage to find...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did something happen?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I-I'm j-just nervous. My legs are shaking...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nervous? Even though you just had such a
magnificent run?

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I was completely absorbed in the race, so I wasn't
thinking of anything else... But then reality came
crashing back in...

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm no good at singing or dancing...

It seems she's been panicking since the race
finished. It's good that she's not injured or sick,
but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You do the concert instead of me! Please! You're
great with concerts, right?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No way... Everyone in the audience is waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But I... I... I'm really scared to go on stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... What should I do?
choice_data_list: Do you think you can help calm her nerves?
Why don't you go out on stage for her?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, good idea! She already showed us such an
amazing race. I'm sure her winning concert will be
just as good!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, listen. I get really nervous before concerts
too.

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Even you get nervous?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. No matter how many times I get on stage, I
always get nervous in front of an audience.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But more than anything, I want the audience to
be happy... And when I think of that, it gets me
excited.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Listen to them.
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
See? ♪ You can hear them cheering, can't you?
It's because they're looking forward to seeing
you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You can even hear them clapping... Everyone is
rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I guess everyone was cheering for
me during the race too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Falco! I'm going out there!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ☆ You'll be fine! Good luck!

After a nudge in the right direction from Smart
Falcon, her friend puts on an admirable winning
concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What a dazzling performance! ☆ Don't you think?
choice_data_list: We'd better step up our game too!
We'd better step up our game too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Right! As long as I have my fans, I'll do whatever I
have to!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? That's not how it works! I can't just
replace people!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their own irreplaceable charm...
That's what being an Umadol is all about!

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But... I...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Can't you see? You're completely
irreplaceable too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's no substitute anywhere in the whole wide
world! Only you can be you! So believe in
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Here's an idea! I'll go on stage with you and
introduce you. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But you're the star of the show, okay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Falco... Okay, I'll try!

With Smart Falcon's help, her friend relaxes and
the show is a great success.

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Falco. Seeing everyone cheering me on
gave me the courage I needed!

text_block_list.name: Winning Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll try my best to do it on my own!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Great! ♪ I'll be trying my best too! The path of
the Umadol is one where we push each other to
greater heights! ☆
